generated_pair.question: What pricing tier of AKS provides service-level agreement (SLA) guarantees?
generated_pair.answer: The Standard pricing tier with the Uptime SLA feature provides service-level agreement (SLA) guarantees.

generated_pair.question: What happens when an AKS cluster in an n-3 version is about to drop to n-4?
generated_pair.answer: AKS automatically upgrades the cluster to n-2 to remain in an AKS support policy.
supporting_sentences: When a cluster in an n-3 version (where n is the latest supported AKS minor version that's generally available) is about to drop to n-4, AKS automatically upgrades the cluster to n-2 to remain in an AKS support policy.

generated_pair.answer: AKS supports Ubuntu Linux, Azure Linux, Azure Linux OS Guard, and Flatcar Container Linux for AKS.
